checkpoints.title: Telegram polling returning 401 Unauthorized
checkpoints.description: Bot token works for sending messages but automatic polling is failing with 401 error. OpenClaw cannot auto-receive messages from Telegram groups.
findings: Bot token is valid — manual send works
Bot is in FAMILY BOT group (Chat ID: -5139970802)
Update offset unchanged — bot not receiving webhooks
Root cause: polling config may use different token than send config
fix_steps: 1. Read current bot token from openclaw.json
3. If ok:true — update polling config to use same token
5. Send test message from FAMILY BOT group
6. Verify OpenClaw auto-processes it without manual intervention
affected: Wife cannot get auto-responses in group
checkpoints.resume_instruction: On next session start, check this checkpoint and fix the Telegram polling 401 error as first priority task.
